Class Controller

java.lang.Object
game.Controller
public class Controller extends Object
Central game-logic hub for one match. Manages turn order, attack selection, projectile lifecycle, ability usage, cooldowns, and delegates status-effect tracking to StatusManager.

Called every frame by the AnimationTimer in GamePlayScene.

  • Constructor Details

    • Controller

      public Controller(BasePlayer p1, BasePlayer p2)
      Parameters:
      p1 - Player 1's character
      p2 - Player 2's character

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update()
      Advances the game by one frame: syncs wind offsets, updates the projectile, processes burn ticks, and checks for a frozen-turn auto-skip. Must be called every frame from the AnimationTimer.

    • selectAttack

      public void selectAttack(Attackable attack)
      Sets the attack type for the current turn. Validates that the attack is not on cooldown and the game state allows selection.
      Parameters:
      attack - the attack to select; null is silently ignored

    • handleSpacebar

      public void handleSpacebar()
      Handles a SPACE key press. First press → Projectile.startAiming(boolean); second press → Projectile.fire().

    • handleAbility

      public void handleAbility()
      Activates the current player's special ability if off cooldown and the projectile is IDLE. Dog: heals and ends the turn. Cat: locks perfect-aim angle and cancels wind on self.

    • getWindXOffset

      public double getWindXOffset(int playerNum)
      Returns the cosine-based horizontal displacement for a wind-affected player.
      Parameters:
      playerNum - 1 or 2
      Returns:
      pixel offset; 0 if the player is not wind-affected

    • isCurrentPlayerFrozen

      public boolean isCurrentPlayerFrozen()
      Returns:
      true if the current turn's player is frozen

    • getSelectedAttackName

      public String getSelectedAttackName()
      Returns:
      the selected attack's name, or "" if none selected

    • getAbilityType

      public AbilityType getAbilityType(boolean isP1)
      Parameters:
      isP1 - which player's ability type to return

    • getAbilityLabel

      public String getAbilityLabel(boolean isP1)
      Parameters:
      isP1 - which player's ability label to return

    • getProjectile

      public Projectile getProjectile()
      Returns:
      the shared Projectile instance

    • isPlayer1Turn

      public boolean isPlayer1Turn()
      Returns:
      true if it is currently P1's turn

    • getBurnTargetPlayer

      public int getBurnTargetPlayer()
      Returns:
      player number currently burning (0 if none)

    • getBurnTicksLeft

      public int getBurnTicksLeft()
      Returns:
      remaining burn ticks

    • getBurnFrameTimer

      public int getBurnFrameTimer()
      Returns:
      frames elapsed in the current burn tick

    • getFrozenPlayer

      public int getFrozenPlayer()
      Returns:
      player number currently frozen (0 if none)

    • getFrozenDisplayTimer

      public int getFrozenDisplayTimer()
      Returns:
      frames remaining until the frozen turn is skipped

    • getWindTargetPlayer

      public int getWindTargetPlayer()
      Returns:
      player number currently affected by wind (0 if none)

    • getWindTurnsLeft

      public int getWindTurnsLeft()
      Returns:
      remaining wind turns

    • getFireCooldown

      public int getFireCooldown(boolean isP1)
      Parameters:
      isP1 - which player's Fire cooldown to query

    • getIceCooldown

      public int getIceCooldown(boolean isP1)
      Parameters:
      isP1 - which player's Ice cooldown to query

    • getWindCooldown

      public int getWindCooldown(boolean isP1)
      Parameters:
      isP1 - which player's Wind cooldown to query

    • getAbilityCooldown

      public int getAbilityCooldown(boolean isP1)
      Parameters:
      isP1 - which player's ability cooldown to query

    • getAndClearProjectileResult

      public String getAndClearProjectileResult()
      Returns and clears the last projectile result string (e.g. "HIT! FIRE!"). Called once per frame by the renderer.
      Returns:
      result string, or "" if no new result
